purpose: Next-phase implementation roadmap for Zeptalytic Web Backend after DB/schema specs are complete.
strategy: Commit architecture/control docs first, then use small foundation specs followed by vertical capability specs.

specs.goal: Establish API versioning, standard error response shape, schema conventions, service/repository boundaries, and dependency patterns.
specs.notes: Keep this foundation small. Do not build every domain repository here.

specs.goal: Build auth/session/account security flows: signup, login, logout, email verification, password reset/change, 2FA enrollment/recovery, account closure, and session/device management.
specs.notes: Parent is sole login authority. Product apps will trust parent-issued identity/session state.

specs.goal: Implement profile/settings/address/communication preference repositories, services, schemas, and APIs.
specs.notes: Username static. Email/phone/timezone/profile picture/Discord username display. Multiple billing/mailing addresses with normalized Google fields and display formatted address.

specs.goal: Implement Pay client foundation, service authentication pattern, account_id linking, projection repositories/services for subscription/payment/entitlement/payment-method/product-access summaries.
specs.notes: Parent may initiate commercial actions but Pay executes. Parent must not duplicate Pay commercial rules.

specs.goal: Implement dashboard summary, launcher product access, billing snapshot, transaction/payment method reads, and manage-subscription initiation APIs.
specs.notes: Pay unavailable should null/empty safe fields, block critical actions, and prevent product launch if entitlement cannot be trusted.

specs.goal: Implement support ticket creation, attachment metadata/storage abstraction, announcement reads, service status by product, and dashboard/support notification feed support.

Implement rewards/objectives/badges read APIs, progress computation, milestone notification state, objective notification queue, reward event ingestion skeleton, and mark-viewed/skip presentation writes.
specs.notes: Frontend cannot directly award points. Product/admin/backend events trigger reward writes.

specs.goal: Implement Discord OAuth capture/linkage flow, settings display, current status, and internal history preservation.
specs.notes: Discord linkage does not affect rewards or product access.

specs.goal: Add worker scaffolding and hardened operational controls for Pay projection sync, email sending, support attachment processing, announcement publishing, Discord sync, stale session cleanup, request IDs, rate limiting, and audit hooks.
specs.notes: Formal outbox can wait unless needed by implementation.

specs.goal: Add contract/regression checks ensuring API payloads support the stable frontend pages and modals.
specs.notes: Use normalized long-term payloads while supporting current UI surfaces.

global_guardrails: Do not duplicate Pay commercial business rules in parent.
Do not store sensitive payment details in parent.
Do not build admin dashboards unless explicitly scoped.
Do not make Discord linkage affect rewards/access.
Do not allow frontend to directly award rewards/points/badges.
Progress entries must be appended at EOF.
Authoritative Docker tests must pass before marking spec items complete.
